displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Best selling sweetened condensed milk in Singapore because it's the best creamer to make your cup of coffee and tea deliciously creamy. You can also use it to whip up perfectly detectable desserts for your family!

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Ways to enjoy:
• Add into your iced coffee or tea
• Add a tablespoon into meat products marinades for a hint of sweetness
• Drizzle over your ice cream to upgrade your dessert

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Sugar, Milk Solids, Milk Fat, Vitamins (A, B1, D3)

displayMetadata.name: NUTRITIONAL DATA
displayMetadata.value:
Attributes Per Serving (20g)
Energy 65kcal
Protein 1.4g
Total Fat 1.6g
Carbohydrate 11.2g
Calcium 52mg
Vitamin A 42µg
Vitamin B1 0.2mg
Vitamin D3 0.6µg
